MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-14-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BOVIS LEND LEASE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS DEMONSTRATING THAT PLAINTIFF'S BUSINESS HAS BEEN DISRUPTED. IN PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION, PLAINTIFF STATES THE BIDDING PROCESS IS NOT COMPLETE. AS A CONSEQUENCE, IT IS NOT CLEAR HOW IT IS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN INJURED. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION WHICH STATES A CLAIM FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF TO PRECLUDE FUTURE DISCLOSURE OF PLAINTIFF'S PROPRIETARY INFORMATION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

APPEARANCES: Jeffrey R. Cluett, Esq. of Quadros & Johnson, LLP 650/377-4300 for pltf & opposing party; Joanna Rosen, Esq. of Thelen Reid Brown Raysman & Steiner LLP 369-7647 for deft & moving party.

Off Calendar Nov-03-2008 Continued To Nov-19-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2008 Continued To Nov-14-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BOVIS LEND LEASE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: the demurrer is sustained as to the first cause of action with 10 days leave to amend to plead facts demonstrating that plaintiff's business has been disrupted. In plaintiff's opposition, plaintiff states the bidding process is not complete. As a consequence, it is not clear how it is that plaintiff has been injured. The demurrer is overruled as to the 2nd cause of action which states a claim for injunctive relief to preclude future disclosure of plaintiff's proprietary information. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Continued To Jul-17-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. Defendant Bovis Lend Lease's Demurrer to Complaint is continued to July 17, 2008 per agreement of the parties. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
